_comment: Embedding-provider catalog for the Studio. Bundled defaults; users can EXTEND this by pointing VECTORS_STUDIO_PROVIDERS at their own JSON file (same schema) — its entries are merged over these by id. 'type' is openai | openai-compatible; 'apiKeyEnv' names the environment variable (resolved via process env, JVM system properties, or the repo .env) holding the API key — the value itself is never persisted or exposed. A null apiKeyEnv means no key is required (e.g. a local Ollama server). 'models' lists the embedding model ids this provider can serve.
